Self-Love.subtitle: On the love that doesn't leave
Self-Love.description: Three essays tracing what's underneath the suffering you call by other names. Read in order.

Begin Here.subtitle: If you're new
Begin Here.description: If you only read five Field Notes, read these — in order. They're the path I'd walk a new client down.
Begin Here.pathway_intro: Read one a day for five days. Sit with each before moving to the next.

For the grieving.subtitle: Seven days for the days after
For the grieving.description: A pathway for the days after a loss. Read one each morning. Don't rush.
For the grieving.pathway_intro: Read one a day for seven days. There's no rush. Grief has its own time.
